A '''rapid ion gun''' was a pistol that fired a powerful rapid ion blast at its target. The [[Eyeball Droid]] was armed with such a weapon.<ref name="SSW" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Super Star Wars]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Super Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back]]''
*''[[Super Star Wars: Return of the Jedi]]''
